popularStory.headline: en.Wikipedia Cecily Neville
popularStory.description: Cecily Neville (3 May 1415 – 31 May 1495) was an English noblewoman, the wife of Richard, Duke of York (1411–1460), and the mother of two kings of England, Edward IV and Richard III. Cecily Neville wa …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Neville於1415年5月3日出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親Ralph Neville51歲，母親Joan de Beaufort40歲。她於1429年10月18日與Richard of York 3rd Duke of York在英國越可爾康尼斯布盧 卡素結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1495年5月31日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾貝可哈姆斯泰德享年80歲。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Neville was born on 3 May 1415, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 51 and her mother, Joan de Beaufort, was 40. She married Richard of York 3rd Duke of York on 18 October 1429, in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 31 May 1495, in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Neville est née le 3 mai 1415, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan de Beaufort, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Richard of York 3rd Duke of York le 18 octobre 1429, à Conisbrough Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1495, à Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Neville am 3. Mai 1415 in Raby Castle, Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Neville 51 und ihre Mutter Joan de Beaufort 40. Sie hat am 18. Oktober 1429 in Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England Richard of York 3rd Duke of York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1495 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Neville è nata il il 3 maggio 1415 nel Raby Castle, Durham, England, sua padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Joan de Beaufort, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Richard of York 3rd Duke of York il 18 ottobre 1429, nel Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 31 maggio 1495, nel Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Nevilleが1415年5月3日にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは51歳，母Joan de Beaufortは40歳であった。1429年10月18日にイギリスヨークシュアイアコニスブロウ カストルでRichard of York 3rd Duke of Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1495年5月31日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークハムステドで80歳で死去した。

ko.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤조우

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Neville(이)가 1415년 5월 3일 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Beaufort(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1429년 10월 18일 영국 요르크실르 코니스브루그h 카스틀에서 Richard of York 3rd Duke of York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 5월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 버카스테드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Neville nasceu em 3 de maio de 1415, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Beaufort, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard of York 3rd Duke of York em 18 de outubro de 1429, em Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de maio de 1495, em Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.killed in Battle of Wakefield, West Ridi: веикефиелд ст мэри, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Neville родилась 3 мая 1415 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Beaufort, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard of York 3rd Duke of York 18 октября 1429 г. в местности конисброую кастл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 31 мая 1495 г. в местности бирхамстед, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Neville nació el 3 de mayo de 1415, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joan de Beaufort, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Richard of York 3rd Duke of York el 18 de octubre de 1429, en Conisbrough Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1495, en Berkhamsted, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
